import React from "react"; import Container from 'react-bootstrap/Container'; import "../styles/contact.css"; import "../index.css"; import Header from "../components/Header.js" import Footer from "../components/Footer.js" import ReactContactForm from 'react-mail-form'; import Card from 'react-bootstrap/Card'; import {Row, Col} from 'react-bootstrap'; class Contact extends React.Component { render() { return (

); } } export default Contact;
